summary: Implemented LSCard, LSPanel, and LSGlassPanel plus AccentColor, added 7 surface stories and focused atom tests, and validated the task on host with targeted XCTest, build, story/boundary greps, and scoped SwiftFormat lint.
verification_commands: source scripts/agent-worktree-env.sh && cd ios && xcodebuild test -scheme LaneShadow -destination 'id=20EC6FD5-4630-4DEF-83F9-1D36093F704E' -only-testing:LaneShadowTests/LSCardTests -only-testing:LaneShadowTests/LSPanelTests -only-testing:LaneShadowTests/LSGlassPanelTests -only-testing:LaneShadowTests/LSGlassPanelTypeSafetyTests
source scripts/agent-worktree-env.sh && cd ios && xcodebuild -project LaneShadow.xcodeproj -scheme LaneShadow -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16' -quiet build

for s in atoms.card.default atoms.card.with-content atoms.panel.default atoms.panel.nested atoms.glasspanel.chrome atoms.glasspanel.callout-signal atoms.glasspanel.callout-warning; do grep -q "$s" ios/LaneShadow/Sandbox/LaneShadowStories.swift || exit 1; done && grep -q 'LSSurfaceStories' ios/LaneShadow/Sandbox/LaneShadowStories.swift && ! grep -REn 'Color\(|Color\.(red|blue|green|black|white|gray|orange|yellow|purple|pink)|#[0-9a-fA-F]{6}' ios/LaneShadow/Views/Atoms/LSCard.swift ios/LaneShadow/Views/Atoms/LSPanel.swift ios/LaneShadow/Views/Atoms/LSGlassPanel.swift

evidence: LSCardTests passed on host using the corrected selector -only-testing:LaneShadowTests/LSCardTests.
Evidence covers surface.card token resolution, radius.lg, elevation.2, and spacing.4 padding.
LSPanelTests passed on host using the corrected selector -only-testing:LaneShadowTests/LSPanelTests.
Evidence covers surface.primary token resolution, radius.md, level0 shadow values, and spacing.3 padding.
LSGlassPanelTests passed on host and assert the .chrome variant uses .ultraThinMaterial.
Evidence also covers radius.xl and overlay elevation token mapping.
LSGlassPanelTests passed on host and assert the .callout(.signal) variant renders the 3pt leading stripe.
LSGlassPanelTests passed on host and assert the .callout(.warning) variant renders the 3pt leading stripe.
LSCardTests passed on host and verify the .spacing5 padding override.
All padding resolution flows through the shared Spacing enum helpers.
LSGlassPanelTypeSafetyTests passed on host and assert the API uses AccentColor rather than raw Color.
Source inspection in the test confirms no raw Color accent parameter remains.
The grep gate passed for all 7 required story ids in LaneShadowStories.swift.
LaneShadowStories.swift contains and aggregates LSSurfaceStories for the current sandbox target.
The no-literal-Color grep gate passed across LSCard.swift, LSPanel.swift, and LSGlassPanel.swift.
Scoped SwiftFormat lint passed on all task files.

reviewer_considerations: LaneShadowStories.swift already acts as the active sandbox aggregator, so the surface story definitions and registration live there in this branch.

The task doc's original XCTest selectors were invalid; host validation used the corrected selectors LaneShadowTests/LSCardTests, LaneShadowTests/LSPanelTests, LaneShadowTests/LSGlassPanelTests, and LaneShadowTests/LSGlassPanelTypeSafetyTests.
An intermediate simulator run failed with a busy/preflight launch error, but the final host run on booted simulator UDID 20EC6FD5-4630-4DEF-83F9-1D36093F704E passed.
notes: The public theme API does not currently expose a direct surface.glass accessor, so glass token fallback is isolated in AccentColor.swift while the three atom files still satisfy the no-literal-Color boundary.
